name: EBV_oriP_origin
description: EBV latent origin of replication oriP: ~1.7 kb element consisting of two components — the family of repeats (FR, 20 copies of a 30-bp EBNA1-binding site) and the dyad symmetry element (DS, four EBNA1-binding sites flanking a dyad). EBNA1 binding to FR tethers the episome to host chromatin for partitioning; binding to DS recruits host ORC/MCM for once-per-cell-cycle initiation. The lytic origin oriLyt is separate (~50 kb downstream). oriP-containing episomes are the basis of many mammalian shuttle vectors.
expected_copy_count: 1 oriP per genome; FR contains 20 tandem EBNA1 sites
